1.name: Chicken Tikka Pizza (Large)
1.description: Broadway's signature pizza topped with spicy chicken tikka chunks, onions, green peppers, and rich mozzarella cheese.

1.name: Tikka Macaroni Pasta
1.description: Spiced elbow macaroni stir-fried with grilled chicken tikka, bell peppers, tomatoes, and local spices.

1.name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
1.description: Cheesy garlic bread slices baked until golden, topped with butter, herbs, and melted mozzarella.

1.name: Choco Lava Cake
1.description: Warm chocolate cake with a delicious molten chocolate center, baked fresh.

2.name: Desi Gulab Jamun (1 kg)
2.description: Soft, sweet milk-solid dumplings dipped in cardamom-infused sugar syrup.

2.name: Special Halwa Puri Nashta
2.description: Classic breakfast: 2 fluffy pooris served with spicy chickpea curry (cholay) and sweet suji halwa.

2.name: Samosa Chaat Plate
2.description: 2 crushed potato samosas topped with spicy chickpea curry, chopped onions, and sweet & sour tamarind chutney.

2.name: Suji Halwa Plate
2.description: Traditional sweet semolina halwa cooked in pure ghee, garnished with almonds and pistachios.

3.name: Special Mutton Karahi
3.description: Fresh mutton cooked with tomatoes, black pepper, ginger, and green chillies in a traditional iron wok.

3.name: Special Chicken Karahi
3.description: Our signature chicken karahi cooked in high-quality desi ghee and freshly ground spices.

3.name: Lacha Paratha
3.description: Crispy, multi-layered flatbread fried in premium ghee, perfect with karahi.

3.name: Seekh Kabab Plate
3.description: 4 pieces of grilled skewered beef mince kababs served with spicy mint raita.

4.name: Chicken Biryani Single
4.description: Spicy and aromatic basmati rice layered with juicy chicken piece, cooked in classic Karachi style.

4.name: Beef Haleem
4.description: Slow-cooked stew of beef, lentils, and wheat, garnished with fried onions, ginger, and lemon.

4.name: Shahi Zarda
4.description: Traditional sweet yellow rice cooked with milk, cardamom, and loaded with almonds and pistachios.

4.name: Zeera Raita & Fresh Salad
4.description: Yogurt blended with cumin seeds, served alongside freshly chopped cucumbers and tomatoes.

5.name: Special Falooda
5.description: A rich glass of sweet rabri milk, cornflour vermicelli, basil seeds, topped with kulfa ice cream scoops.

5.name: Kulfa Ice Cream Scoop
5.description: Classic Pakistani traditional rich ice cream flavored with saffron and nuts.

5.name: Mango Shake
5.description: Thick milk shake blended with sweet Pakistani Chaunsa mangoes and cream.

5.name: Chocolate Brownie with Ice Cream
5.description: Warm fudge brownie served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream and hot chocolate syrup.

6.name: Peshawari Mutton Karahi
6.description: Traditional Shinwari karahi cooked with sheep fat, tomatoes, black pepper, and green chillies (no onions).

6.name: Peshawari Chicken Karahi
6.description: Juicy chicken cooked in Shinwari style with black pepper, fresh ginger, and tomatoes.

6.name: Tandoori Roti
6.description: Crispy tandoori whole wheat flatbread baked fresh on clay oven walls.

6.name: Balochi Chicken Sajji
6.description: Whole chicken roasted slow on charcoal, rubbed with special Balochi chatpatta spices.

7.name: Special Nalli Nihari
7.description: Slow cooked beef shank stew in rich spiced gravy, topped with warm bone marrow (nalli).

7.name: Javed Plain Beef Nihari
7.description: Deliciously thick and aromatic beef stew cooked overnight, garnished with ginger and green chillies.

7.name: Tandoori Sheermal
7.description: Slightly sweet, saffron-infused tandoori flatbread, perfect companion for Nihari.

7.name: Beef Paya
7.description: Traditional slow-cooked gelatinous beef trotters in rich aromatic spiced soup.

8.name: Crispy Chicken Burger
8.description: Golden crispy fried chicken breast fillet inside a soft bun with lettuce and mayo.

8.name: Howdy Beef Burger
8.description: Premium grilled beef patty with cheese slice, onions, pickles, and signature Howdy burger sauce.

8.name: Club Sandwich
8.description: Triple decker sandwich with chicken, boiled egg, cheese, lettuce, and tomatoes.

8.name: French Fries (Large)
8.description: Hot and crispy salted french fries served with ketchup.

9.name: Chocolate Fudge Cake
9.description: Layers of rich moist chocolate cake loaded with premium chocolate fudge frosting.

9.name: Lotus Cheesecake Slice
9.description: Creamy cheesecake baked on a Biscoff biscuit crust, topped with melted Lotus spread.

9.name: Red Velvet Cupcake
9.description: Soft red velvet cake base topped with rich cream cheese frosting.

9.name: Chocolate Chip Cookie (Soft Baked)
9.description: Soft and chewy cookie loaded with milk chocolate chips.
